prompt: How many course sections are taught in each building?

inputData.question: How many course sections are taught in each building?

response.bodyRaw: {"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How many course sections are taught in each building?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How many course sections are taught in each building?"},"startedAt":1771803912988,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Count course_sections associated with classrooms grouped by the classrooms.building. Order deterministically by count desc then building name.","sql":"SELECT b.building AS building, COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count FROM public.classrooms b LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON visualization.title: Number of course sections taught in each building

resultRaw.sql: SELECT b.building AS building, COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count FROM public.classrooms b LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.classroom_id = b.id GROUP BY b.building ORDER BY section_count DESC, b.building ASC;

visualization.title: Number of course sections taught in each building

result.sql: SELECT b.building AS building, COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count FROM public.classrooms b LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.classroom_id = b.id GROUP BY b.building ORDER BY section_count DESC, b.building ASC;
